cards.prompt: Deferred: side-effecting Select does not run until ToList (before=0 after=3)
cards.code: using System; using System.Linq; using System.Collections.Generic; int calls = 0; var src = new List<int>{1,2,3}; var q = src.Select(x => { calls++; return x*2; }); Console.Write($"before={calls} "); var list = q.ToList(); Console.Write($"after={calls}");

cards.prompt: Streaming: Where(...).First() over Range(1,100) reads only 7 elements
cards.code: using System; using System.Linq; int seen = 0; var src = Enumerable.Range(1, 100); var first = src.Where(x => { seen++; return x % 7 == 0; }).First(); Console.WriteLine($"first={first} seen={seen}");

cards.prompt: Nonstreaming: OrderByDescending over Range(1,10) reads all 10 before first yield
cards.code: using System; using System.Linq; int seen = 0; var src = Enumerable.Range(1, 10); var q = src.OrderByDescending(x => { seen++; return x; }); int firstOut = q.First(); Console.WriteLine($"first={firstOut} seen={seen}");
